summary: Calibration loop regression fix verified and enhanced. The QA user (cal-loop-416d7f85@biqctest.io) was seeded as fully calibrated. Backend APIs correctly return COMPLETE status. Frontend ProtectedRoute.js was enhanced with synchronous sessionStorage cache check to prevent completed users from getting stuck on /calibration loading screen during auth bootstrap.

backend_tests.test_04_auth_me_returns_user_data: PASS - Returns user with correct email and role

frontend_tests.login_no_calibration_loop: PASS - User lands on /advisor after login, not /calibration
frontend_tests.manual_calibration_nav_redirects: PASS - Navigating to /calibration redirects to /advisor within 1 second

fix_applied.description: Added synchronous sessionStorage cache check for auth state during LOADING. When a user with session navigates to /calibration during auth bootstrap, the code now checks the cached auth state: if READY, redirect to /advisor immediately; if NEEDS_CALIBRATION, allow calibration page; if no cache, redirect to /advisor as safe default.
fix_applied.code_change: Added getCachedAuthState() helper function and updated LOADING state handling for calibration route

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: ProtectedRoute.js LOADING state was showing LoadingScreen indefinitely for calibration route. Now uses sessionStorage cache to determine user state synchronously.
Backend APIs all return correct status for completed QA user - no backend changes needed
The 'Getting Started' modal on /advisor page is expected behavior for users without integrations connected
seed_data_creation: QA user seeded by main agent with calibration=COMPLETE, onboarding=completed
context_for_next_testing_agent: Calibration loop regression fix verified. The issue was that ProtectedRoute.js showed LoadingScreen indefinitely when a completed user navigated to /calibration during auth bootstrap. The fix adds a synchronous sessionStorage cache check to determine user state immediately, redirecting completed users to /advisor without waiting for full auth bootstrap.

rca_of_issue.root_cause: ProtectedRoute.js had a bug where during AUTH_STATE.LOADING, if user/session existed and path was /calibration, it returned <LoadingScreen /> indefinitely. The auth bootstrap in SupabaseAuthContext takes several seconds to complete API calls. Meanwhile, the loading screen blocked any redirect logic from executing.
reproduction_steps: 3. User gets stuck on 'Establishing secure connection...' loading screen
4. User never redirects to /advisor even though backend returns COMPLETE status
rca_of_issue.fix_applied: Added getCachedAuthState() function to synchronously read sessionStorage cache. During LOADING state, if on /calibration route, check cache: if READY, redirect to /advisor; if NEEDS_CALIBRATION, show calibration page; if no cache, redirect to /advisor as safe default.
